title: Long story practice
text: Once there was a girl named Maya who loved to read. Every night she read a book under the covers with a tiny flashlight. One night the book started to glow! Inside was a tiny world with tiny people. Maya was their hero from then on. She visited every night.

tips.target: Once there was a girl named Maya who loved to read. Every night she read a book under the covers with a tiny flashlight. One
night the book started to glow! Inside was a tiny world with tiny people. Maya was their hero from then on. She visited every night.

character_tips.anna: Long story practice. Focus across multiple sentences.
character_tips.klavochka: A magical reading adventure, my dear 📚✨
